results.title: Baghel meeting Channi and other party leaders on Saturday
results.description: The feedback of Punjab in-charge Bhupesh Baghel, and the party's strategy for Parliament's monsoon session, are expected to be discussed in Tuesday afternoon's meeting.

results.title: Rupee falls 62 paise to close at 96.30 against US dollar
results.description: The rupee depreciated 62 paise to close at 96.30 (provisional) against the US dollar on Tuesday, amid a surge in crude oil prices and renewed geopolitical concerns.

results.title: India’s Strong Message To Iran After Sailor’s Death In Hormuz Ship Strike
results.description: New Delhi: India has summoned Iran’s deputy chief of mission in New Delhi after an Indian crew member was killed while eight others, including six Indians, sustained injuries in an Iranian strike on the United Arab Emirates’ two shipping tankers in the Strait of Hormuz. The foreign ministry summoned Mohammad Javad Hosseini to lodge a [...]

results.title: 7 must-visit small towns in Germany
results.description: Germany has much more to offer than Berlin, Munich and Frankfurt. Across the country, charming small towns welcome visitors with medieval streets, hilltop castles, lakeside promenades, vineyards and mountain views. Whether you're planning a road trip, looking for a quieter holiday or simply want to experience Germany's local culture, these seven picturesque towns promise history, scenic beauty and memorable experiences away from the crowds.

results.title: 'Hold Pakistan responsible': India's global appeal over use of force against PoK protests
results.description: India called on the international community to hold Pakistan responsible for its actions in PoK.

results.title: Virat Kohli, Gautam Gambhir Reportedly Avoid Interaction During Edgbaston Practice Session
results.description: Tensions run high in the Indian cricket camp as Virat Kohli and Head Coach Gautam Gambhir conspicuously avoid interaction during a practice session at Edgbaston, Birmingham. This comes as India take on England in the first of the three-match ODI series as visitors aim to bounce back from recent T20I defeats.

results.title: SIT reconstructs minor rape-murder crime scene in Baruipur
results.description: SIT reconstructs a minor rape-murder crime scene in Baruipur, West Bengal, while gathering fresh forensic evidence amid ongoing investigation.
